blocks.text: TORM ANNUAL REPORT 2019 CONSOLIDATED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS 122

For information on assets provided as collateral security, please refer to note 16. Please refer to note 8 for information on impairment testing. The depreciation expense related to "Other plant and operating equipment" of USD 1.0m relates to "Administrative expense" (2018: USD 1.1m, 2017: USD 0.9m). Depreciation and impairment losses on tangible fixed assets on "Vessels and capitalized dry-docking" relate to operating expenses.

NOTE 7 – LEASING TORM has leases for the office buildings, some vehicles and other administrative equipment. With the exception of short-term leases and leases of low-value assets, each lease is reflected on the balance sheet as a right-of-use asset with a corresponding lease liability. The right-of-use assets are included in the financial statement line item in which the corresponding underlying assets would be presented if they were owned. Please refer to note 6.
